asset_type: wide landscape TaraHome technical blog cover
prompt: A clean editorial photograph about maintaining and updating local smart-home devices without relying on a vendor app. Show a warm, lived-in residential living room in soft morning light with a natural oak side table, linen upholstery, and a practical table lamp glowing in the background. A homeowner's hands naturally check a small physically plausible unbranded white smart plug and an unbranded contact sensor on the table, with a smartphone resting nearby face-down so no screen or interface is visible. Use photorealistic candid editorial home photography, natural textures, slight everyday imperfections, warm cream and wood tones, and one restrained dark-green fabric or ceramic accent. Keep the hands and two small devices recognizable in both 16:9 and centered 16:10 crops. No text, logos, trademarks, QR codes, branding, embedded headline, visible screen, invented futuristic device, unsafe electrical work, watermark, charts, graphs, routing or network overlays, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, holograms, glowing data effects, or generic AI-looking diagrams.
